name: NavigationMenu
description: A collection of links for navigating websites, with support for dropdown content and viewport animations.
whenToUse: Use for main site navigation, header menus, mega menus, and primary navigation bars.

props.name: orientation
props.description: The orientation of the navigation menu

props.name: delayDuration
props.description: Delay in ms before opening on hover
